name: Feixiao
description:

➤ My bots are designed for proxy users. if you are interested in my bots, then I advise you to use a proxy to get acquainted.

Thanks for the request!

Please feel free to leave inquiries. On the contrary, it's very pleasant and convenient for me, because requests mean interest in my bots, and this inspires me :)

I finally got HSR working on my laptop after a week of being unable to log in to my account. My laptop, which I've rewrote 8 times and in which I've reinstalled drivers 10 times, is IN SHOCK.

I hope it doesn't explode.
